description:
## [1.37.1](https://github.com/Ripthulhu/morphe-youtube/compare/v1.37.0...v1.37.1) (2026-07-20)

### 🐛 Bug Fixes

* **youtube:** read each state field independently so one unreadable field no longer fails the whole call — state threw INTERNAL whenever a video was open, which is exactly when a caller polls it
* **youtube:** report the failing exception class in INTERNAL replies instead of swallowing it
